title: papaver anomalum var. chinense
intro: Papaver anomalum var. chinense is a species of poppy native to China, also known as the Chinese poppy or Chinese meconopsis. It is a perennial plant with blue and white flowers, valued for its medicinal and ornamental properties. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Papaver anomalum var. chinense include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms associated with colds, coughs, and sore throats.
